agents.name: TECHNICAL_SPECIALIST
agents.description: Handles technical questions grounded in local technical documentation.
cannotHandle: customer account lookups unrelated to technical documentation
examples: Why do I get a 401 error?
What does the deployment guide say about environment variables?

agents.name: BILLING_SPECIALIST
agents.description: Handles billing-related support requests using billing data stored in the SQL database. The agent can check a customer's current subscription plan, explain the refund policy for that subscription, and open a refund support case after collecting all required information.
canHandle: checking the customer's current subscription plan
confirming whether the subscription is active
asking for missing billing data such as email or refund description
generating and returning refund case numbers
cannotHandle: issues that require technical documentation lookup
examples: My email is john.doe@example.com - check my subscription.
What is the refund policy for my account?
Open a refund case for me.
Create a refund ticket for alice.smith@example.com.
